projectDescription: A Spanish general elections data platform with a MySQL database schema, Java-based data importer for official .DAT files, and categorized SQL query examples.
keyFeatures: MySQL database schema for Spanish general election data (2016)
Java-based importer to parse official .DAT election files
ZIP extraction utility for .DAT file archives
Hierarchical geographic model: autonomous communities, provinces, municipalities
Vote aggregation at municipality, province, and autonomous community levels
Categorized SQL query examples from basic aggregation to window functions
publicApiSurface: Tables: comunitats_autonomes, provincies, municipis, eleccions, eleccions_municipis, candidatures, persones, candidats, vots_candidatures_mun, vots_candidatures_prov, vots_candidatures_ca
